sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111418" key="filopote/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-ποτέω</orth>, <sense id="n111418.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">to be fond of drinking,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Phan.Hist.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0542.tlg001:6:20" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Poll.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.20</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
